case_title: OPORTUN, INC. VS. ROCIO MENDOZA GARCIA

docket_entries.description: ORDER RE: DISMISSED W/O PREJUDICE (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,438.57 FILED BY OPORTUN, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT GARCIA, ROCIO MENDOZA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-17-2018 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC.
REMARK:FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 7/29/2022 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 681.53.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $55.00) SERVED JUN-21-2018, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT GARCIA, ROCIO MENDOZA

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE BY REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY GUADALUPE ACEVEDO, LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST. DEFENDANT ROCIO GARCIA IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF REQUESTS TO DISMISS W/O PREJUDICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: ANNE WONG; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506
